headline: PSE&G is Ready for 100-Degree Heat This Week: How to Stay Safe, Be Energy Smart and Report Outages
summary: With temperatures expected to climb to over 100 degrees for several consecutive days this week, PSE&G is prepared to respond and is encouraging customers to take steps now to stay safe, conserve energy and manage their bills.
